outputRelation: Witness assignment falsifies the claimed universal predicate
termination: Finite domain cardinality within capability limits
representationRefinement: FinitePredicate IR → assignment evaluation → counterexample predicate
performanceNotes: Single-witness evaluation only; exhaustive search is out of scope.
knownLimitations: Absence of a counterexample is never completeness.
Does not claim universal quantification over infinite domains.
